parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id,
  c.name,
  (c.metadata->>'kind') AS commodity_type,
  (c.metadata->>'id') AS uex_commodity_id
FROM commodities c
ORDER BY c.name;

SELECT
  c.id,
  c.name,
  (c.metadata->>'uex_id')  AS uex_commodity_id,
  (c.metadata->>'kind')    AS category,
  (c.metadata->>'code')    AS commodity_code,

  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT COUNT(*) 
      FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT t2.id
        FROM prices p2
        JOIN trade_terminals t2
          ON t2.id = p2.terminal_id
        WHERE p2.commodity_id = c.id
          AND p2.asset_type = 'commodity'
          AND GREATEST(
                COALESCE(p2.sell_price, 0),
                COALESCE(p2.buy_price, 0)
              ) > 0
      ) AS term_ids
    ),
    0
  ) AS terminals_total,

  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT jsonb_agg(
               jsonb_build_object(
                 'terminal_name', sub.terminal_name,
                 'price', sub.price
               )
               ORDER BY sub.terminal_name
             )
      FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          t1.name AS terminal_name,
          GREATEST(
            COALESCE(p1.sell_price, 0),
            COALESCE(p1.buy_price, 0)
          ) AS price
        FROM prices p1
        JOIN trade_terminals t1
          ON t1.id = p1.terminal_id
        WHERE p1.commodity_id = c.id
          AND p1.asset_type = 'commodity'
          AND GREATEST(
                COALESCE(p1.sell_price, 0),
                COALESCE(p1.buy_price, 0)
              ) > 0
      ) AS sub
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS terminals_with_price

FROM commodities c
WHERE c.id = '{{$json["id"]}}';
